title: Community Shelters * Homeless Men - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Community Shelters * Homeless Men 11 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Ex-Offenders Homeless Couples Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Veterans Homeless Women Homeless Youth Mothers Pregnant Individuals ASTORIA RESCUE MISSION MEN'S SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an emergency shelter stay up to five nights and an additional six month Christian-based transitional housing program. The shelter administers drug tests and searches the property of guests. Serves breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Access to a clothing closet, showers, and a laundry facility allowing one load per week. 62 W Bond Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older, who are clean and sober. Must not have a registered sex offense. Hours: Check in for shelter: 7 days per week 5pm Email (503) 325-6243 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BOISE RESCUE MISSION MINISTRIES RIVER OF LIFE MEN'S SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers emergency meals, shelter, and clothing. Shelter services include education, job search assistance, and mental health counseling. 575 S 13th Street Boise, ID 83702 Eligibility: Shelter and clothing: Men experiencing homelessness with a focus on veterans Meals: Unrestricted Hours: Shelter: Check in 4pm-5:30pm Dinner: 5pm for community guests including women and children Email (208) 389-9840 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION WAGNER HALL MEN'S SHELTER MEN'S SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community shelter, subject to review every 30 days. Residents are required to attend morning and evening chapel and Sunday church services. If working, can continue without interruption. If unemployed, will be assigned a job chore. Residents without jobs are not allowed to leave the building for extended periods of time until after the first 30 days. 540 SW Foundry Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older. No drug use or smoking allowed. Hours: Walk-in hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 476-0082 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH FALLS GOSPEL MISSION 30-DAY DRUG-FREE SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates an emergency/short term shelter that provides daily meals, showers, and clothing. Clients must be able to care for themselves and willing to do a 4 hour chore. 1931 Mission Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Prospective guests must be 72 hours free of substance use before intake. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3:30pm Email (541) 882-4895 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LANE COUNTY HUMAN SERVICE DIVISION LANE COUNTY SHELTER FINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shelter locator with bed availability in Lane County. Not all shelters in Lane County are listed. 151 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Varies by shelter Hours: Not applicable (541) 682-3798 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFEBOAT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community shelter. Guests will be served a hot meal and have access to showers, laundry, toilietries, a clothing closet. phone and internet access, socks, and underwear. Maximum capacity is 22 individuals and beds are available on a first-come, first-serve basis. 1040 Commercial Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older, emancipated youth, and families with minor children Hours: Intake: 7 days per week 6pm-6am Check-in: 7 days per week 6pm-8pm Email (503) 468-8176 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION BURNSIDE SHELTER BURNSIDE SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides overnight emergency shelter for men. Open spaces provided daily, as available. Spaces are maintained for guests who return nightly. 111 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older Hours: Lottery signup: 7 days per week 8am-4:30pm Lottery names posted: 5pm Shelter check in: 8pm Email (503) 906-7690 Get Directions Visit Website More Details REDEMPTION HOUSE MINISTRIES REGENERATION HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Overnight shelter with 16 beds. A shower and load of laundry is offered for guests. Dinner and sack breakfast provided for people staying overnight. Spaces are provided on a first-come, first-serve basis. May be open as an emergency shelter as space allows. 970 NW Madras Highway Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older experiencing homelessness. No one will be admitted under the influence of drugs or alcohol. Hours: 7 days per week 4pm-8am Email (541) 362-5642 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION MEN'S SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an overnight men's shelter with a dayroom offering showers, laundry facilities, meals, and clothing. Guests must attend the chapel service. 526 SE Lane Avenue Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older. Service animals only. Hours: Check in before 6pm Shelter curfew is 6:30pm Meal times: Breakfast: Monday-Friday 6:30am, Saturday-Sunday 7:30am Lunch: Monday-Friday noon, Saturday-Sunday 1pm Dinner: 7 days per week 5:30pm Email (541) 673-3004 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNION GOSPEL MISSION OF SALEM MEN'S MISSION MEN SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency shelter. Services available to guests include food, emergency clothing, laundry, mail services, faith-based addiction and mental health counseling, and case management. Guests may have the opportunity to move forward into the New Life Fellowship transitional housing program. 777 Commercial Street NE Salem, OR 973010431 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older. Service animals accepted. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 362-3983 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION MEN'S FACILITY 30 DAY SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides 30-day short-term shelter. Services include a clothing closet, showers, and hygiene items. Shelter space is limited. Unaccompanied minors may be eligible for services with the permission of a guardian or law enforcement agency. 1234 NE 14th Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with children. Guests must abstain from substance use for the duration of their stay. Animals are allowed. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. Doors lock at 10pm. Email (503) 472-9766 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ASTORIA RESCUE MISSION MEN'S SHELTER GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION MEN'S SHELTER KLAMATH FALLS GOSPEL MISSION 30-DAY DRUG-FREE SHELTER LANE COUNTY HUMAN SERVICE DIVISION LANE COUNTY SHELTER FINDER LIFEBOAT SERVICES LIFEBOAT SERVICES PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION BURNSIDE SHELTER REDEMPTION HOUSE MINISTRIES REGENERATION HOUSE ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION ROSEBURG RESCUE MISSION MEN'S SHELTER UNION GOSPEL MISSION OF SALEM MEN SHELTER YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION 30 DAY SHELTER
